title: Route Reconciliation / CorrectionCenter active or pilot back to disabled or legacy
steps: Set SliceCutoverState.runtime_mode to rollback for Reconciliation and CorrectionCenter.
Disable reconciliation.* and correction.* feature flags or narrow them to zero percent.
Route new bank import and correction actions to disabled or legacy read-only paths.
Keep imported statements, candidates, matches, mismatches, correction requests, approvals, and applied corrections append-only.
If an applied correction is wrong, create a compensating correction rather than deleting or editing the original correction.
validation_steps: Run invariant-runner for MR-09 P0 invariants.
Run shadow-compare-runner and confirm no red report exists before returning to pilot or active.
Confirm imports do not emit PaymentConfirmed.
Confirm correction.apply.enabled is disabled for rolled-back scopes.
Confirm PC before/after and correction audit remain visible for already-created correction history.
